meta.title: Yuki Sasai | AI Product Engineer
meta.description: Engineer with 50+ web projects, now expanding into AI-powered product development.

hero.lead: From web development to AI-powered products.
hero.leadSub: 5+ years and 50+ websites delivered. Now building with AI and modern web technologies.

about.title: Design, build, ship.
body: I started my career in a digital advertising agency, where I worked on Meta Ads operation, creative production, campaign optimization, and performance improvement.

After that, I became independent and focused on web development, contributing to more than 50 website projects. My experience includes corporate websites, recruitment sites, landing pages, and e-commerce sites, primarily built with WordPress.
Currently, I am expanding my expertise into Next.js, TypeScript, system design, Python, and AI-powered product development.
My goal is to combine advertising, marketing, web development, and system design to build products that solve real business problems.
In the long term, I aim to become an AI Product Engineer who helps businesses and local communities solve meaningful challenges through AI-powered products.
